name: Mate Router
description: Routes WhatsApp inbound to either a per-user agent (if sender is in phone_number_routing) or to the onboarding flow (if sender is unbound). Replaces OpenClaw's default-agent routing for WhatsApp messages.

mcpUrl.description: Base URL of the Elec-AI MCP server (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3100).

apiKey.description: VPS API key for authenticating to MCP.

hmacSecret.description: HMAC secret used to sign requests to MCP.

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout when calling MCP /api/wa-inbound. Default 4000.
